DATA ACCESS 
After registration, you will be able to download our data. To assist you, our 
HelpCenter is available, and more specifically its section about download. 
 
Information on operational issues on products and services can be found on our 
User Notification Service. If you have any questions, please contact us. 
 
 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the CMEMS Ocean Monitoring Indicator 
(OMI) family OMI_CLIMATE -VARIABILITY made from global product : it provides 
time series of climate variability indices such as the Sea Surface Tempature 
anomaly (sst_anom) and sub surface temperature anomaly (zt) averaged in the 
NINO3.4 area. 
 
It contains 1D (time dimension) and 2D (depth time) anomaly information 
computed from GREP ensemble product of renanalysis. The time series are 
available over the 1993 -2023 period. The temporal sampling is one month. The 
time series will be extended monthly (and closer to present time) starting in 2020.   
 
GLOBAL_OMI_CLIMATE-VARIABILITY includes two products:  
• global_omi_climate-variability_nino34_sst_anom contains monthly m ean 
time series of SST anomaly computed  over NINO3.4  Area for  1993 – 2023 
period. This dataset is produced using G REP ensemble mean of three 
global reanalyses (GLOBAL_MULTIYEAR_PHY_ENS_001_031). 
• global_omi_climate-variability_nino34_Tzt_anom contains mo nthly mean 
time series of sub-surface temperature anomaly computed  over NINO3.4  
Area for  1993 – 2023 period. This dataset is produced using GREP 
ensemble mean of three global reanalyses 
(GLOBAL_MULTIYEAR_PHY_ENS_001_031). 
 
The product is published on the CMEMS dissemination server after automatic 
and delayed -mode quality co

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for CMEMS Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) family OMI_CLIMATE-VARIABILITY, providing time series of climate variability indices such as Sea Surface Temperature anomaly and sub-surface temperature anomaly averaged in the NINO3.4 area.
